parameters.name: html_to_pdf
parameters.description: Generate a PDF from HTML content. The HTML can include full styling, images (as base64 or URLs), tables, etc. Parameters: html (required, full HTML document or fragment), css (optional CSS stylesheet or empty string), filename (optional filename like 'report.pdf' or empty string)

value.html: ={{ $fromAI('html', 'Full HTML content to convert to PDF', 'string') }}
value.filename: ={{ $fromAI('filename', 'Optional filename like report.pdf or empty string', 'string') }}

parameters.name: extract_text
parameters.description: Extract text content from a PDF. Parameter: pdf_url (required, URL of the PDF file), pages (optional, page numbers like '1,2,3' or '1-5' or empty string for all)

value.pdf_url: ={{ $fromAI('pdf_url', 'URL of the PDF to extract text from', 'string') }}
value.pages: ={{ $fromAI('pages', 'Page numbers like 1,2,3 or 1-5 or empty string for all', 'string') }}

parameters.name: merge_pdfs
parameters.description: Merge multiple PDFs into one. Parameter: pdf_urls (required, comma-separated URLs of PDFs to merge), filename (optional, output filename or empty string)

parameters.name: list_files
parameters.description: List stored PDF files. No parameters needed.

parameters.name: get_file
parameters.description: Get a download link for a stored PDF. Parameter: document_id (required, the document UUID from html_to_pdf or list_files)
